name: vault-tools
description: Obsidian vault toolkit — skills, rules, and hooks for note creation, search, inbox processing, maintenance, frontmatter validation, and automatic plan archival on ExitPlanMode.

vault_path.title: Obsidian Vault Path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault (e.g., /home/user/Vaults/MyVault or C:\Users\user\Vaults\MyVault)
